series_metadata.series_description: A report that lists all cash transactions processed for a particular day. Could Include: Audit reconciliation report, Lockbox report, Bank reconciliation report, EFT summary, Electronic Payroll deduction breakdown, Various Email for adjustments, Reallocation report, Fund manager reports, Nacha file returns, Voucher report and check returns.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep 1 year on-site for audit then store 1 year off-site, then destroy., Paper: Shred
